title: helianthemum glaucum var. clausonis
intro: Helianthemum glaucum var. clausonis, also known as Rock Rose, is a flowering plant species within the Cistaceae family, native to the Iberian Peninsula and parts of Europe. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rock Rose include its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe skin irritations, and exhibit potential antiviral properties. Traditionally, herbal preparations of Rock Rose have been used in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, often employed to address various health issues.
